upstreamCalls.query:
query ProductsHydrateNodes($ids: [ID!]!) {
  nodes(ids: $ids) {
    __typename
    id
    ... on Product {
      legacyResourceId
      title
      handle
      status
      vendor
      productType
      tags
      totalInventory
      tracksInventory
      createdAt
      updatedAt
      publishedAt
      descriptionHtml
      onlineStorePreviewUrl
      templateSuffix
      seo { title description }
    }
  }
}
